Saud Kruger

Astrogator Tours
Mentions Timeline (3 articles)
3307-09-30
Saud Kruger Receives Exploration Data
Saud Kruger successfully collects enormous amounts of Earth-like world exploration data for Astrogator Tours, with tourist beacons planned for promising destinations.
3307-09-23
Saud Kruger Seeks New Holiday Worlds
Saud Kruger launches a campaign to identify new Earth-like worlds for Astrogator Tours holiday cruises, offering rewards for exploration data and imagery.
3305-01-24
Commercial Travel Impacted by Hyperspace Fears
The Consuela Knight disappearance causes a drop in consumer confidence for commercial space travel, with luxury yacht sales plummeting and cruise bookings being cancelled across the galaxy.
